EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for OTT Hot Lead that has previously been a Warm Lead (with WhatsApp).
EmailTemplate.name: OTT Renewal Reminder (WhatApp) Email_SDR
EmailTemplate.subject: Your business insurance is renewing soon
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
I understand from On the Tools that your business insurance is renewing soon. I’d love to provide you with a competitive, no-obligation quote that you can compare with your current provider.
Here’s why our insurance schemes stand out amongst our competitors:
- Real people, real support: quick access to dedicated UK-based insurance specialists. - UK-based claims centre: rapid, responsive claims processing managed by an in-house claims team. - There when you need them: strong history of fair, fast, and hassle-free claims processing. - Tailored industry expertise: cover specifically built for contractors, freelancers, and small business owners. - No hidden fees: transparent pricing with no unexpected costs.
I’d love to get you on the phone to run through quote for you. Book a call with me - https://calendly.com/d/crv2-4cb-zcj/kingsbridge-insurance-call-back-on-the-tools
Not able to answer calls during the day? Send me a message on WhatsApp using 07917 515428 and I’ll contact you via message instead.
Alternatively, contact me on 01242 808 740. Our office is open 8:00am-5:30pm, Monday-Friday.
I look forward to hearing from you!
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
